seoDescription: dryAPI helps product and platform teams ship multi-model AI APIs with stable routing, transparent pricing, and production guardrails.

hero.heading: About dryAPI
hero.body: dryAPI helps product, platform, and applied AI teams ship chat, image, speech, video, OCR, and embedding workloads through one API with stable contracts, predictable billing, and production-grade routing.

sections.title: Who We Are
sections.body: We build a unified AI inference platform for teams that need model choice, billing clarity, and operational safety without stitching together multiple vendors.

cards.title: One Contract Across Models
cards.description: dryAPI keeps request and response shapes consistent so teams can swap chat, image, speech, and embedding models without rewriting integrations.

cards.title: Transparent Pricing And Credits
cards.description: Teams can compare model economics, manage prepaid credits, and understand cost tradeoffs before traffic reaches production.

cards.title: Production Guardrails
cards.description: Routing, auth, rate limits, and billing controls stay aligned so AI features are easier to launch and safer to operate.

sections.title: What Teams Get
sections.body: dryAPI is built for teams that need to evaluate models quickly, integrate with standard clients, and move from prototype to production without platform sprawl.

cards.title: OpenAI-Compatible Integration
cards.description: Use familiar SDK patterns and documented request shapes to adopt new models without building a custom gateway from scratch.

cards.title: Hands-On Evaluation
cards.description: Test prompts, inspect payloads, and compare model behavior in the playground before you commit production traffic.

cards.title: Direct Platform Support
cards.description: Talk to the team when you need help with routing choices, rollout planning, or production pricing decisions.
